name: campish-ecommerce
description: Modern e-commerce platform built with Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && echo 'Setup complete! Run npm run dev to start development servers.'

author: CAMPISH Team
